nodes.name: avro.json
nodes.summary: Avro schema definition for the Twitter event record, specifying field names and types used when ingesting data via the Avro connector in the integration test.

nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: Defines the RisingWave source reading Twitter-like events, configurable to use either Avro or Protobuf encoding depending on the test variant.

nodes.name: create_mv.sql
nodes.summary: Creates materialized views joining tweet and user data from the Twitter source for analytics and hashtag trend queries in the integration test.

nodes.name: query.sql
nodes.summary: Validation queries against the Twitter materialized views verifying that streaming data is correctly ingested and aggregated.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose file orchestrating RisingWave and a message producer service for the Twitter (Kafka/Avro) integration test.

nodes.name: twitter.proto
nodes.summary: Protobuf schema defining the Event, TweetData, and User message types for the Twitter integration test, shared across Protobuf-based test variants.
